query: SELECT r.id, r.name, r.userId, p.fullName as pFullName, p.passportImageUrl FROM registrations r LEFT JOIN passport_info p ON r.userId = p.userId WHERE r.meetupId = (SELECT id FROM meetups ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1) LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZhmXq2fuwbq2e6E.b3f96895581d --database 9L2UFkGMTFNGvGrFPN8jYv --execute SELECT r.id, r.name, r.userId, p.fullName as pFullName, p.passportImageUrl FROM registrations r LEFT JOIN passport_info p ON r.userId = p.userId WHERE r.meetupId = (SELECT id FROM meetups ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1) LIMIT 10;
